languages.text: "Итак, теперь можно говорить свободно. И я скажу: понятия не имею, кто ты, но ты зря пытаешься вмешаться в мои планы!" {n}Ювенна выхватывает из кобуры игольный пистолет и приставляет его снизу к вашей челюсти.{/n}

"Now I can speak freely. Let me tell you this: I have no idea who you are, but you made a mistake when you tried to interfere in my plans!" {n}Juvenna snatches a needle pistol from its holster and presses it under your chin.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Итак, теперь можно говорить свободно. И я скажу: понятия не имею, кто ты, но ты зря пытаешься вмешаться в мои планы!" {n}Ювенна выхватывает из кобуры игольный пистолет и приставляет его снизу к вашей челюсти.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Now I can speak freely. Let me tell you this: I have no idea who you are, but you made a mistake when you tried to interfere in my plans!" {n}Juvenna snatches a needle pistol from its holster and presses it under your chin.{/n}

"Now I can speak freely. Let me tell you this: I have no idea who you are, but you made a mistake when you tried to interfere in my plans!" {n}Juvenna snatches a needle pistol from its holster and presses it under your chin.{/n}

"Now I can speak freely. Let me tell you this: I have no idea who you are, but you made a mistake when you tried to interfere in my plans!" {n}Juvenna snatches a needle pistol from its holster and presses it under your chin.{/n}

languages.text: «Ahora puedo hablar con libertad. Permítame decir esto: no tengo ni idea de quién es, ¡pero ha cometido un error al intentar interponerse en mis planes!». {n}Juvenna desenfunda una pistola de agujas y la apoya bajo tu garganta.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Now I can speak freely. Let me tell you this: I have no idea who you are, but you made a mistake when you tried to interfere in my plans!" {n}Juvenna snatches a needle pistol from its holster and presses it under your chin.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «Ahora puedo hablar con libertad. Permítame decir esto: no tengo ni idea de quién es, ¡pero ha cometido un error al intentar interponerse en mis planes!». {n}Juvenna desenfunda una pistola de agujas y la apoya bajo tu garganta.{/n}

languages.text: “现在说话就方便了。听好了：我不知道你是谁，但你胆敢插手我的计划，算是酿成大错了！”{n}尤文娜猛地从枪套中抽出毒针手枪，抵在你的下颌上。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Now I can speak freely. Let me tell you this: I have no idea who you are, but you made a mistake when you tried to interfere in my plans!" {n}Juvenna snatches a needle pistol from its holster and presses it under your chin.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “现在说话就方便了。听好了：我不知道你是谁，但你胆敢插手我的计划，算是酿成大错了！”{n}尤文娜猛地从枪套中抽出毒针手枪，抵在你的下颌上。{/n}

languages.text: « Maintenant que je peux m'exprimer librement, laissez-moi vous dire une bonne chose : qui que vous soyez, vous avez commis une erreur en tentant d'interférer avec mes plans ! » {n}Juvenna dégaine un pistolet à aiguilles dont elle vous plaque le canon sous le menton.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Now I can speak freely. Let me tell you this: I have no idea who you are, but you made a mistake when you tried to interfere in my plans!" {n}Juvenna snatches a needle pistol from its holster and presses it under your chin.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Maintenant que je peux m'exprimer librement, laissez-moi vous dire une bonne chose : qui que vous soyez, vous avez commis une erreur en tentant d'interférer avec mes plans ! » {n}Juvenna dégaine un pistolet à aiguilles dont elle vous plaque le canon sous le menton.{/n}

languages.text: "Artık rahatça konuşabilirim. Sana şunu söyleyeyim: Kim olduğun hakkında hiçbir fikrim yok ama planlarıma müdahale etmeye çalışarak hata yaptın!" {n}Juvenna, kılıfından bir iğne tabancası çekiyor ve çenene dayıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Now I can speak freely. Let me tell you this: I have no idea who you are, but you made a mistake when you tried to interfere in my plans!" {n}Juvenna snatches a needle pistol from its holster and presses it under your chin.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Artık rahatça konuşabilirim. Sana şunu söyleyeyim: Kim olduğun hakkında hiçbir fikrim yok ama planlarıma müdahale etmeye çalışarak hata yaptın!" {n}Juvenna, kılıfından bir iğne tabancası çekiyor ve çenene dayıyor.{/n}

languages.text: "Jetzt kann ich frei sprechen. Ich sage Euch dies: Ich habe keine Ahnung, wer Ihr seid, aber es war ein Fehler, sich in meine Pläne einzumischen." {n}Juvenna zieht die Nadelpistole aus ihrem Halfter und hält sie dir unter das Kinn.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Now I can speak freely. Let me tell you this: I have no idea who you are, but you made a mistake when you tried to interfere in my plans!" {n}Juvenna snatches a needle pistol from its holster and presses it under your chin.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Jetzt kann ich frei sprechen. Ich sage Euch dies: Ich habe keine Ahnung, wer Ihr seid, aber es war ein Fehler, sich in meine Pläne einzumischen." {n}Juvenna zieht die Nadelpistole aus ihrem Halfter und hält sie dir unter das Kinn.{/n}

languages.text: 「今なら自由に話せるわ。聞いてちょうだい。君が誰なのかはわからないけど、私の計画に干渉しようとした時、君は間違いを犯したわ！」{n}ジュベナはホルスターから針銃を抜き、あなたの顎の下に押し付ける。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Now I can speak freely. Let me tell you this: I have no idea who you are, but you made a mistake when you tried to interfere in my plans!" {n}Juvenna snatches a needle pistol from its holster and presses it under your chin.{/n}
